examples: Business decisions are often made with many unknow and unknowable factors, which would even puzzle the best poker players.
The specific impact of the greenhouse effect is unknowable.
The price tag for all this is unknowable.
Invention has its own algorithm: genius, obsession, serendipity, and epiphany in some unknowable combination.
But focusing on the known, instead of the unknowable, sounds like a good idea.
